creator: sjac998@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 181393
Updates port from sock-0.4.1 to sock-0.4.2

This is a follow-on to bug IDs 206345 and 217909.

Bug id 217909 is currently open, and must be added first.

This update changes the version to sock-0.4.2.  It adds various socket options, mostly applicable to IPv6.
